privileged_info_summary: The task uses real SRTM (Shuttle Radar Topography Mission) elevation data from NASA/USGS sourced via the official QGIS Training Data GitHub repository. The input DEM (srtm_41_19.tif) covers Western Cape, South Africa and is a genuine 837x661 pixel, 16-bit GeoTIFF available at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/qgis/QGIS-Training-Data/master/exercise_data/raster/SRTM/srtm_41_19.tif. The trail vector input (proposed_trail_2d.geojson) is synthetically generated with a 6-point LineString for the 'Cape Loop Trail'. The task drapes this 2D line over the DEM using QGIS's Drape algorithm to produce a 3D output with elevation values. Output verification checks for valid 3D geometry with populated Z-values extracted from the DEM raster.
